page.div: Location is recorded for review only and does not block visit execution.

div.invisible: not route_geo_enabled or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'require_reason' or visit_process_state != 'draft'

page.div: Geo check-in is required before Start Visit. Outside-zone check-ins require a reason before the visit can start.

div.invisible: not route_geo_enabled or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'block_start' or visit_process_state != 'draft'

page.div: Geo check-in is required before Start Visit. Outside-zone check-ins cannot start the visit.
Geo location is disabled in Route Settings.

div.invisible: geo_checkin_status != 'pending' or route_geo_checkin_policy not in ('require_reason', 'block_start') or visit_process_state != 'draft'

page.div: Please capture your location before starting the visit.

div.invisible: geo_checkin_status != 'outlet_missing' or route_geo_checkin_policy not in ('require_reason', 'block_start') or visit_process_state != 'draft'

page.div: Outlet location is missing. Please set and verify outlet coordinates before starting the visit.
You are outside the allowed outlet radius. This is recorded for review only.

div.invisible: geo_checkin_status != 'outside' or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'require_reason' or visit_process_state != 'draft' or geo_checkin_outside_zone_reason

page.div: You are outside the allowed outlet radius. A reason is required before starting the visit.

div.invisible: geo_checkin_status != 'outside' or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'require_reason' or visit_process_state == 'draft' or not geo_checkin_outside_zone_reason

page.div: Outside-zone check-in reason was recorded for supervisor review.
You are outside the allowed outlet radius. This visit cannot start under the current policy.
Geo Check-in is locked because this visit has already started.

button.name: action_geo_checkin_from_outlet_location
button.invisible: context.get('route_pda_salesperson_mode') or not route_geo_enabled or outlet_geo_status == 'missing' or visit_process_state != 'draft'

button.name: action_clear_geo_checkin_location
button.invisible: visit_process_state != 'draft' or (not geo_checkin_latitude and not geo_checkin_longitude)

page.invisible: visit_execution_mode == 'direct_sales' or outlet_operation_mode == 'direct_sale' or outlet_operation_mode == 'direct_sales' or visit_process_state in ('collection_done', 'ready_to_close', 'done')

div.invisible: visit_execution_mode == 'direct_sales' or not summary_return_transfer_refs or summary_return_transfer_refs == '-'
visit_execution_mode != 'direct_sales' or not direct_stop_order_refs or direct_stop_order_refs == '-'
visit_execution_mode != 'direct_sales' or not direct_stop_return_refs or direct_stop_return_refs == '-'
visit_execution_mode == 'direct_sales' or route_enable_lot_serial_tracking == False or route_enable_expiry_tracking == False or outlet_near_expiry_count == 0
visit_execution_mode == 'direct_sales' or route_enable_lot_serial_tracking == False or route_enable_expiry_tracking == False or pending_near_expiry_line_count == 0

visit_execution_mode == 'direct_sales' or (not display_payment_ids and consignment_amount_due_now == 0 and collected_amount == 0 and consignment_immediate_remaining_amount == 0 and promise_to_pay_count == 0)

visit_execution_mode != 'direct_sales' or (not display_payment_ids and direct_stop_grand_due_amount == 0 and direct_stop_settlement_paid_amount == 0 and direct_stop_immediate_remaining_amount == 0 and not direct_stop_open_promise_amount)
visit_execution_mode != 'direct_sales' or not direct_stop_order_refs or direct_stop_order_refs == '-'
visit_execution_mode != 'direct_sales' or not direct_stop_return_refs or direct_stop_return_refs == '-'

page.div: Location is recorded for review only and does not block visit execution.

div.invisible: not route_geo_enabled or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'require_reason' or visit_process_state != 'draft'

page.div: Geo check-in is required before Start Visit. Outside-zone check-ins require a reason before the visit can start.

div.invisible: not route_geo_enabled or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'block_start' or visit_process_state != 'draft'

page.div: Geo check-in is required before Start Visit. Outside-zone check-ins cannot start the visit.
Geo location is disabled in Route Settings.
Please capture your location before starting the visit.
You are outside the allowed outlet radius. This is recorded for review only.

div.invisible: geo_checkin_status != 'outside' or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'require_reason' or visit_process_state != 'draft' or geo_checkin_outside_zone_reason

page.div: You are outside the allowed outlet radius. A reason is required before starting the visit.

div.invisible: geo_checkin_status != 'outside' or route_geo_checkin_policy != 'require_reason' or visit_process_state == 'draft' or not geo_checkin_outside_zone_reason

page.div: Outside-zone check-in reason was recorded for supervisor review.
You are outside the allowed outlet radius. This visit cannot start under the current policy.
Geo Check-in is locked because this visit has already started.

button.name: action_geo_checkin_from_outlet_location
button.invisible: context.get('route_pda_salesperson_mode') or not route_geo_enabled or outlet_geo_status == 'missing' or visit_process_state != 'draft'

button.name: action_clear_geo_checkin_location
button.invisible: visit_process_state != 'draft' or (not geo_checkin_latitude and not geo_checkin_longitude)

field.name: help
field.p: Visit History is for review and operational settlement.

field.name: help
field.p: Open the route visits for the selected plan in workspace mode.
